THE RED MONKEY

Rich and full-bodied with notes of coffee, dark chocolate, and roasted malt. Smooth, creamy texture with a dry finish.

Midnight Stout

Stout • 6.8% ABV

Brewery Dark Horse Brewery
Style Stout
ABV 6.8%
IBU 38
Color Deep Black
Price £5.20

Malts
Pale Malt, Roasted Barley, Chocolate Malt
